title: Explore and Trace
description: Map repositories and data flow with exact file evidence before implementation. Avoid broad unbounded scans and summarize only verified facts
body: Map repositories and data flow with exact file evidence before implementation. Avoid broad unbounded scans and summarize only verified facts. Workflow: read binding roadmap and source, inspect relevant implementation, identify owner package, verify generated artifacts and acceptance coverage, then report exact evidence. Non-goals: placeholders, shallow descriptions, or docs that are not backed by code.
